fields.label: Shopify Gateway
fields.description: Match by payment_gateway_names[0] — case-insensitive exact match. Examples straight from Shopify payloads: 'Cashfree Payments', 'manual', 'shopify_payments', 'Razorpay', 'cod'. Leave blank if you want to match purely by tag.

fields.label: Tag Contains
fields.description: Optional. Match if Shopify's order 'tags' field contains this string (case-insensitive substring). Higher priority than Shopify Gateway. Useful for merchants whose Cashfree / Razorpay / PayU integration marks orders as 'manual' but tags them 'CASHFREE - UPI', 'RAZORPAY', etc.

fields.label: Mode of Payment
fields.description: Optional — ERPNext Mode of Payment to set on the Payment Entry. Leave blank to let ERPNext pick the default for the bank account.

fields.label: Bank / Cash Account
fields.description: Ledger Account (type: Bank or Cash) that receives this gateway's payment.
